title: Iran War Forces Cash-Strapped Asian Nations to Buy Expensive LNG

title_cn: 伯纳姆首次削减能源税以帮助生活费用
summary: The UK will scrap a 5% tax on energy bills starting from October, new Prime Minister Andy Burnham announced, the first of several policies expected to offer households more “breathing space” with the cost of living.

summary: China lodged a protest against the Philippines on Tuesday for what it described as “malicious harassment” of its personnel in the South China Sea, disputing Manila’s version of the clash that injured a Filipino crewman.

title_cn: 卢比奥上任后，东南亚警告美国与伊朗的战争将产生溢出效应

title: Korean President Slammed Over Unorthodox $2 Million Home Sale

summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung’s attempt to set an example by selling his apartment in support of the government’s housing supply drive has instead highlighted the financing constraints facing ordinary homebuyers, fueling criticism of his administration’s lending policies.

title: US-Iran Strikes Extend to 10th Day as Houthis Threaten New Front
title_cn: 胡塞武装威胁新阵线，美伊袭击延长至第十天

title: DOJ Can Give Biden Recordings to Conservative Group, Court Rules

summary: A federal appeals court cleared the way for a conservative advocacy group to obtain copies of interviews Joe Biden privately recorded years ago for his memoir, denying the former president’s request for a temporary block.

title: Asia Is Seeing More Destabilizing Actions, Australia FM Penny Wong Says

summary: The Asia-Pacific region is seeing more destabilizing actions, according to Australia’s foreign minister, who cited China’s recent missile test and its military buildup as issues where nations want reassurance from Beijing.

title: Hegseth Faces Lawmakers Over Iran War Costs as Conflict Widens
title_cn: 随着冲突扩大，赫格斯面临立法者关于伊朗战争成本的问题
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is set to testify before lawmakers for the first time in more than two months to defend the Trump administration’s request for billions of dollars in additional money for the Iran war and address growing public skepticism about the course of the conflict.

title: Israel Election 2026: Can Netanyahu Stay in Power? Who Could Succeed Him?
